guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"a7nkq","text":"Onepot-seq is single cell RNA sequencing(scRNA-seq) experiment method.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5fge9","text":"The main idea of Onepot-seq is to do single cell experiment in continuous medium without compartmentalization.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"s8kv","text":"Therefore, we focus on temperature control and not disturbing the solutions due to transient mRNA steps: Suspend cells in PBS (1,000 cells/μl of concentration is recommended)
Suspend beads in incubation buffer (20,000 beads in 100 µL incubation buffer) (incubation buffer : 6% Ficoll PM-400, 20mM EDTA, 0.2M Tris pH 7.5)
Add incubation buffer to 12 well plate
Add 1,000 cells (suspended in PBS) to incubation buffer, let the sum of solution volume be 900 µL .
Add 20,000 beads (suspended in 100 µL incubation buffer)
Gently pipette 1 mL incubation buffer to spread the beads and cells evenly
Wait 00:15:00 to sink the cells and beads down to the bottom (Depending on the cell type, it may take more time to sink)
Gently stack up 200 µL of lysis buffer on top of incubation buffer (※ avoid the beads being affected by current flow)
Incubate for 00:15:00
Quickly disrupt 1.2ml of solutions with 1 mL of 6X SSC
Quickly transfer 2.2ml of solutions to 30 mL of 6X SSC (in 50 ml falcon tube)
Pipette 4~5 times to avoid mRNA cross contamination
Centrifuge beads (1000 X g / 00:01:00 ) After centrifugation, discard supernatant
Add 1 mL of 6X SSC
Transfer beads to 1.5ml tube
Wash beads 3 times with 1 mL 6X SSC
Wash beads with ~ 300 µL of 5X RT buffer

Add 200 µL Reverse Transcription mix (RT mix) %s %s RT mix composition H20 80 μl Maxima 5X RT buffer 40 μl 20% Ficoll PM-400 40 μl 10mM dNTPs 20 μl 100uM TSO 5 μl RNase inhibitor 5 μl Maxima H- RTase 10 μl Total 200 μl
Incubate for 00:30:00 at Room temperature using rotator
Incubate for 01:30:00 at 42 °C using rotator
Wash the beads once with 1 mL TE-SDS
Wash the beads twice with 1 mL TE-TW
Wash the beads once with 1 mL of 10 millimolar (mM) Tris pH8.0
Add 200 µL of Exonuclease I mix (Exo I mix) %s %s Exonuclease mix composition 10X ExoⅠbuffer 20 μl H20 170 μl ExoⅠ 10 μl Total 200 μl
Incubate for 00:45:00 at 37 °C using rotator
Wash the beads once with 1 mL TE-SDS
Wash the beads twice with 1 mL TE-TW
Wash the beads twice with 1 mL DW
Resuspend beads with DW (2,000-2,500 beads in 10 μL of DW)
Aliquot 10 µL beads containing solutions to 8-strip tube

Add polymerase and PCR primer to each tube 1 reaction of PCR mix composition follows below : %s %s cDNA amplification PCR composition H20 + beads 24.6 μl SMART PCR Primer (100uM) 0.4 μl 2X KAPA 25 μl Total 50 μl (50μL PCR reaction for 100~125 cells / 2,000~2,500 beads)

Run PCR following the protocol below: %s %s PCR running protocol 95C 3min Denature 98C 20 sec Annealing 65C 45 sec Elongation 72C 3 min 4 cycles Denature 98C 20 sec Annealing 67C 20 sec Elongation 72C 3 min 9 cycles Final extension 72C 5 min Hold 4C forever
Collect PCR cDNA library solutions to 1.5ml tube
0.6X Ampure bead purification elute cDNA library into 20 µL DW
Wash Poly T beads 3 times with 1 mL PBSB (PBSB : PBS supplemented with 0.1% BSA)
For NGS library prep, follow the Nextera XT DNA Library Preparation Kit (#FC-131-1024) manufacturer's instructions.
If multiple wells or larger area wells are used to increase the number of cells, collect beads corresponding to 5,000 cells in one falcon tube. (RT mix is effective up to 5,000 cells)
If you are testing more than 1,000 cells, increase the number of wells or increase the area of ​​the wells according to cells and beads number.
creator: JungWon Choi
